commands.review_summary:
The PR wires shared lifecycle status reactions into WhatsApp, adds deploy/build/concierge status-reaction categories/defaults, and extends config schema/types/help plus Telegram reaction variants.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings from source: the shared controller’s terminal cleanup, the proposed WhatsApp clear adapter, and the existing audio-preflight ack ordering make the regressions traceable without a live account. I did not run a live WhatsApp or Telegram session in this read-only review.
